rationale: X's point about deriving the component list from an existing per-pipeline source (like _dit_modules) instead of yet another hardcoded tuple closely mirrors dsocek's real concern about driving the mapper from _packed_modules_mapping instead of ad-hoc lists, and X adds a second grounded, actionable point about the text-encoder LoRA gap with concrete file:line references. Y's review is a thorough-looking checklist that ultimately produces zero actual review comments and just rubber-stamps APPROVE, missing the one substantive concern reviewers actually raised and offering nothing actionable.
